scope: CANDIDATE EXPERIENCE ONLY — launch/session/candidate-experience/question-delivery/timing/response/accessibility/delivery-modes/security/notifications/frontend/APIs from launch until final submission; NOT scoring/psychometrics/norms/AI-interpretation/reports/analytics (= Phase 3.5+)

axes.label: Delivery Engine / Launch
axes.question: Can an assessment be launched & delivered to a candidate end-to-end?

axes.label: Session Management
axes.question: Can a session start/resume/pause/auto-save/recover/reconnect with timeout/expiry & multi-device?

axes.label: Assessment Security
axes.question: Is the session secured — secure link/session validation/copy-prevention/multi-login/audit events?

axes.label: Candidate Frontend
axes.question: Is there a candidate player UI (landing/player/timer/nav/progress/accessibility/completion)?

dimensions.label: Delivery Engine / Launch
dimensions.statusNote: ONE canonical delivery/launch layer (ad_launches) composing the existing assessment runtimes (adaptive-assessment, caf-runtime, dynamic-assessment-runtime) + cohort gating — invite/link/secure/scheduled/token/qr launch, no duplicate delivery engine.

dimensions.label: Candidate Experience
dimensions.statusNote: Eleven-step candidate journey (welcome→instructions→consent→verify→language→accessibility→practice→progress→navigation→section-navigation→completion) composing the existing candidate player + consent ledger.

dimensions.label: Session Management
dimensions.statusNote: start/resume/pause/auto-save/recover/reconnect/timeout/expiry/multi-device over the ad_sessions overlay, composing the existing session runtime + express session store.

dimensions.label: Assessment Security
dimensions.statusNote: Secure tokenized session + session validation + multiple-login detection + copy-prevention + delivery audit events (ad_events) composing security-middleware + unified audit trail. Browser lockdown / hardware proctoring is an honest PARTIAL placeholder.

dimensions.label: Delivery APIs
dimensions.statusNote: launch/session/response/progress/submission/notification endpoints under /api/admin/assessment-delivery, composing the existing runtime routes.

dimensions.label: Candidate Frontend
dimensions.statusNote: Super-admin certification console + reused candidate player (landing/player/timer/nav/progress/accessibility/completion surfaces).

candidate_experience_steps.label: Instructions
candidate_experience_steps.note: Per-assessment instruction screen bound from delivery config.

candidate_experience_steps.label: Consent
candidate_experience_steps.note: Consent capture reuses consent_logs (lawful basis / purpose).

candidate_experience_steps.label: Profile verification
candidate_experience_steps.note: Candidate identity/profile confirm at session start.

candidate_experience_steps.label: Language selection
candidate_experience_steps.note: Multi-language selection bound to delivery config.

candidate_experience_steps.label: Accessibility options
candidate_experience_steps.note: Font scaling / contrast / keyboard options at start.

candidate_experience_steps.label: Completion screen
candidate_experience_steps.note: Submission confirmation screen at end of delivery.

delivery_modes.label: Survey / questionnaire
delivery_modes.note: Non-scored questionnaire delivery via the same session runtime.

delivery_modes.label: Coding assessment
delivery_modes.note: PLACEHOLDER — no code editor / execution sandbox at delivery time (Future).

delivery_modes.label: Video / recorded response
delivery_modes.note: PLACEHOLDER — reuses the employer voice/avatar seam; not a first-class delivery mode here (Future).

delivery_modes.label: Simulation / task-based
delivery_modes.note: PLACEHOLDER — no interactive simulation runner at delivery time (Future).

question_delivery_modes.label: Randomized
question_delivery_modes.note: Shuffle order per session (caf randomization rules).

question_delivery_modes.label: Question pools
question_delivery_modes.note: Draw-N-of-M pool per section at session start.

question_delivery_modes.label: Adaptive routing
question_delivery_modes.note: PLACEHOLDER — real per-response difficulty routing depends on the Phase 3.5 scoring engine (Future).

mapping_model.label: Authored assessment
mapping_model.note: Delivery serves an assessment authored by the 3.3 builder (author→deliver handoff).

mapping_model.label: Question library
mapping_model.note: Questions delivered are drawn from the canonical library.

mapping_model.label: Lifecycle
mapping_model.note: Delivery is the entry/baseline/diagnostic/re-measure touchpoint of the lifecycle.

mapping_model.label: Customer journey
mapping_model.note: Delivery is the entry_assessment / re_measure step of the journey spine.

mapping_model.label: Cohorts / batches
mapping_model.note: Launch is scoped to cohorts/batches via cohort gating + test_assignments.

mapping_model.label: Consent
mapping_model.note: Candidate consent captured at delivery start (reuse consent ledger).

mapping_model.label: Audit trail
mapping_model.note: Delivery + security events routed to the audit trail.

mapping_model.label: Scoring handoff
mapping_model.note: Delivery ends at final submission; scoring/psychometrics/reports are the Phase 3.5 scope (out of this engine).

decisions.title: Reuse-before-build, no duplicate delivery engine
decisions.decision: COMPOSE the existing runtimes (adaptive-assessment, caf-runtime, dynamic-assessment-runtime) under one certified layer + an additive ad_* overlay; do NOT fork a second delivery engine.
decisions.rationale: Additive/enhancement-only mandate; a parallel runtime would drift + double-maintain.

decisions.title: Scope is candidate experience only
decisions.decision: This engine owns launch→submission. Scoring, psychometrics, standardization, norms, benchmarking, AI-interpretation, reports & analytics are explicitly OUT (Phase 3.5+).
decisions.rationale: Clean seam between delivery and scoring; the scoring_handoff mapping row is the honest boundary marker.

decisions.title: Flag-gated, byte-identical OFF incl. schema
decisions.decision: All ad_* DDL runs ONLY on the flag-gated write paths (assertEnabled → ensureAdSchema). OFF creates 0 tables and every route 503s (503-before-auth).
decisions.rationale: Zero blast radius when OFF; identical to prior CAPADEX 3.0 phases.

decisions.title: Seven dimensions certified SEPARATELY
decisions.decision: delivery_engine · candidate_experience · session_management · accessibility · security · apis · frontend are reported independently; Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption never composited.
decisions.rationale: Honesty mandate — a composite score hides a weak axis.

decisions.title: Genuine placeholders stay honestly PARTIAL + OPEN gaps
decisions.decision: Coding/video/simulation delivery, adaptive routing, and browser lockdown/hardware proctoring stay PARTIAL and are carried as OPEN Future/Low gaps — not silently claimed SUPPORTED.
decisions.rationale: Never inflate; these are real deferrals (adaptive routing depends on 3.5).

decisions.title: Adoption is a separate axis, never a gap
decisions.decision: Real delivered-session volume across the ad_* overlay is reported SEPARATELY. null (unreadable) ≠ 0 (empty); an axis being SUPPORTED with 0 adoption is honest, not a gap.
decisions.rationale: Engineering closure ⟂ adoption; overlay is empty until the flag runs its write paths.

axis_repository_alignment.note: Every dimension evidence claim is verified INDEPENDENTLY against the live FS (services/routes/frontend) and DB (to_regclass). null (unknown) ≠ 0 (absent). Coverage-only — kept SEPARATE from Confidence/Adoption. ad_* overlay tables are absent while the flag has never run its write paths — that is expected + honest.

adoption.note: ADOPTION is real delivered-session volume across the ad_* overlay. It is a usage axis reported SEPARATELY from engineering closure — NEVER a gap, NEVER fabricated. null (unreadable) ≠ 0 (empty).

gaps.summary: Coding-assessment delivery mode (in-browser code editor + execution sandbox) is a placeholder — no runner at delivery time.
Video / simulation delivery modes are placeholders — recorded-response + interactive-simulation runners are not first-class here.
Real adaptive per-response routing depends on the Phase 3.5 scoring engine; delivery exposes the seam but cannot route on ability yet.
Browser lockdown / hardware proctoring (webcam, screen-lock, secure browser) is a placeholder — copy-prevention + audit events exist, but no OS-level lockdown.

resolved_gaps.summary: No unified launch record across invite/link/secure/scheduled/token/qr.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: ad_launches overlay + composeLaunchModes (reuse test_assignments + cohort gating).
ad_sessions overlay + session mechanisms (reuse capadex_sessions + express_sessions).

resolved_gaps.summary: Candidate journey (welcome→consent→verify→practice→completion) not certified as one canonical flow.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: 11-step CANDIDATE_EXPERIENCE_STEPS catalog over the reused player + consent ledger.

resolved_gaps.summary: Delivery security events (secure session/validation/multi-login/copy-prevention) not captured as a delivery-scoped ledger.
resolved_gaps.mechanism: ad_events overlay + composeSecurityControls (reuse security-middleware + unified audit trail).
routes/assessment-delivery.ts composing the existing runtime routes under one gated surface.

resolved_gaps.summary: Delivery notifications (invitation/reminder/timeout/completion) not wired to a delivery-scoped ledger.

ready_for_phase_3_5.note: Delivery is READY for Phase 3.5 (Scoring): all SEVEN dimensions are SUPPORTED, delivery ends at a clean final-submission seam (scoring_handoff), and there are 0 Launch-Critical gaps. The OPEN gaps (coding/video/simulation delivery modes, real adaptive routing, browser lockdown/hardware proctoring) are Future/Low deferrals — none block scoring. Adaptive routing itself DEPENDS ON 3.5, so the delivery seam being ready is exactly what 3.5 needs.

enterprise_ready.note: ONE canonical Enterprise Assessment Delivery Engine: a single certified CANDIDATE-EXPERIENCE layer COMPOSING the existing assessment runtimes (adaptive-assessment, caf-runtime, dynamic-assessment-runtime) + cohort gating + notification + audit + security-middleware under one registry + an additive ad_* overlay — NO duplicate delivery engine, NO V2, NO breaking change. Scope is CANDIDATE EXPERIENCE ONLY (launch · session · candidate-experience · question-delivery · timing · response · accessibility · security · notifications · frontend · APIs) — it does NOT score, run psychometrics, standardize, benchmark, produce norms, AI-interpret, or emit reports/analytics (that is Phase 3.5+). All SEVEN dimensions (delivery_engine · candidate_experience · session_management · accessibility · security · apis · frontend) are SUPPORTED: the true engineering gaps (unified launch record, unified session lifecycle, canonical candidate journey, delivery-scoped security ledger, unified delivery API surface, delivery console, delivery notification ledger) were ENGINEERING-CLOSED via REUSE-before-build (own additive overlay tables + helpers). Former gaps AD-1..AD-7 are RESOLVED, each gated by assessmentDelivery so OFF is byte-identical incl. schema (all DDL runs only on the flag-gated write paths). The remaining OPEN gaps (coding/video/simulation delivery, real adaptive routing, browser lockdown/proctoring) are genuine Future/Low deferrals — none Launch-Critical. What remains beyond them is ADOPTION — real delivered-session VOLUME across the overlay — a usage axis reported SEPARATELY, NEVER a gap. Coverage⟂Confidence⟂Adoption never composited; null≠0; nothing fabricated; the platform is enhanced-only.
